productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Blue Tshirt
description: CompositionNavy blue polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, half buttoned placket, branding embroidered on the left chest , short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash similar colours togetherMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeUS Polo's flair for understated and focussed minimalism is on display in this textured polo t-shirt. The label has the ability to polish classic pieces with a contemporary vibe, and this time they've brought a Steve McQueen-esque style back in vogue. Wear this with corduroy trousers, a jacket and casual shoes. This piece also goes perfectly with form fitting denims and canvas shoes. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
